Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: We need to generate 20 open-ended questions about the described supply chain process. The questions should be thought-provoking, focusing on insights, issues, improvement strategies, and implications. No SQL. Just list.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me think of various aspects: R&D, supplier selection, lead times, quality, logistics, customs, inventory strategies, distribution, demand forecasting, sustainability, compliance, digital systems, analytics, etc.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I'll produce 20 questions covering different angles.
